sentences.arabic: حَجَزْتُ غُرْفَةً مُفْرَدَةً فِي فُنْدُقٍ قَرِيبٍ مِنْ مَرْكَزِ الْمَدِينَةِ.
sentences.translation: Rezervisao sam jednokrevetnu sobu u hotelu blizu centra grada.
sentences.translationEn: I booked a single room in a hotel near the city center.

sentences.arabic: طَلَبْتُ مِنَ الْمُوَظَّفِ غُرْفَةً تُطِلُّ عَلَى الْبَحْرِ الْأَزْرَقِ.
sentences.translation: Tražio sam od službenika sobu s pogledom na plavo more.
sentences.translationEn: I asked the staff for a room overlooking the blue sea.

sentences.arabic: أَخْبَرَنِي الْمُوَظَّفُ أَنَّ الْفُطُورَ مَجَّانِيٌّ لِجَمِيعِ الضُّيُوفِ.
sentences.translation: Službenik me obavijestio da je doručak besplatan za sve goste.
sentences.translationEn: The employee told me that breakfast is free for all guests.

sentences.arabic: دَفَعْتُ ثَمَنَ الْإِقَامَةِ بِبِطَاقَةِ الِائْتِمَانِ عِنْدَ الِاسْتِقْبَالِ.
sentences.translation: Platio sam boravak kreditnom karticom na recepciji.
sentences.translationEn: I paid for the stay with a credit card at the reception.

sentences.arabic: سَأَبْقَى هُنَا لِمُدَّةِ أُسْبُوعٍ وَاحِدٍ فَقَطْ.
sentences.translation: Ostat ću ovdje samo jednu sedmicu.
sentences.translationEn: I will stay here for only one week.
